summary: Fritz approved freezing the updated Studio UI Foundation. The foundation is now the canonical rulebook for Site Studio UI direction and supersedes earlier rigid dashboard/card workbench proposals.

approved_decisions.decision: Freeze docs/STUDIO-UI-FOUNDATION.md as the canonical UI foundation for FAMtastic Site Studio.
Left navigation is domain-level only: Sites, Brainstorm, Plans, Components, Media, Research, Admin.

Every production workspace must declare domain, route, parent, purpose, primary work surface, selected object model, contextual tools, Shay context, proof required, promotion targets, and anti-patterns before implementation.
Shay is ambient everywhere and invoked as Lite/Desk from the current workspace. Shay is not a left-nav domain.
Media is Media Studio: prompt-first generation, comparison, promotion, and usage proof. Media Library is a supporting surface, not the domain purpose.
The bench is the primary task surface. Cards may represent repeated items, but cards must not replace the workspace job.
Tools appear because the selected object needs them. Tool order, visibility, and grouping are workspace state, not fixed global chrome.
Canonical writes, brand-kit changes, deploys, expensive generations, and destructive actions propose first and apply only after approval.

open_gaps: Production Workbench prototype remains a prototype and should not become the default shell until rebuilt from the frozen workspace contract.
Shay Desk overlay/right-edge context provider is conceptually frozen but not production-wired.
Media Studio prompt-first controls are not unified with the existing production Media mini-app.
Plan/Task/Run registry data is not yet rendered in Workbench.
